- Fix SSH certificate validity check using wrong timezones
- Fix vault user passphrase being set inconsistently, resulting in some wiped identities
- Fix quit mode setting like tray or background not working properly
- Fix terminal and remote desktop dock windows not properly closing on lock
- Fix docker containers using non-existent shell when docker was running on Windows
- Fix shell session failing to start if remote system disk was full
- Fix zip file browser action sometimes using wrong base directory
- Fix various shell init issues
- Fix various NullPointers
